title: Nephrodium javanicum
taxonomy: Nephrodium javanicum belongs to the family Matoniaaceae and is a type of fern. It is classified as a genus within the fern family. More specifically, it falls under the kingdom Plantae, phylum Pteridophyta, class Polypodiopsida, and order Polypodiales. The plant's classification reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history. Nephrodium javanicum's classification has been studied extensively in the field of botany.

intro: Nephrodium javanicum, also known as the Nephrolepis fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Nephrolepidaceae.
